title: Runtime session state
description: Disposable runtime glue — the last active project/repo/spec/command. NOT durable doctrine: major decisions live in project memory and the ledger, never only here.

schemaVersion.description: Semantic version of this state shape.

lastActiveProject.description: Project id last worked, or null.

lastActiveRepo.description: Repo path/name last worked, or null.

lastActiveSpec.description: Spec id/path last worked, or null.

lastCommand.description: Most recent command run, or null.

updated.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the last update, or null.
